bride.name: Ẹniọláolúwa Ọmọlọlá
bride.body: A strategist by profession, writer by calling, and teacher at heart, Eniolaoluwa delights in turning complex ideas into meaningful impact. She believes excellence is an act of worship, words carry weight, and every season has purpose. Whether she is building strategies, mentoring young people, or writing reflections, she hopes to leave every place a little better than she found it.

groom.name: Tiwaladé Ìfẹ́olúwa
groom.body: A technology professional with an engineer's mind and a servant's heart, Tiwaladé enjoys solving problems, simplifying complexity, and building systems that make life better. Calm, thoughtful, and quietly dependable, he is happiest creating solutions, serving people, and faithfully pursuing God's purpose one day at a time.
